title: Amritsar、Punjab — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Amritsar、Punjab的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Amritsar是Punjab的一個城市，人口約1,200,000。The spiritual center of Sikhism, home to the Golden Temple, known for its Punjabi culture, delicious cuisine, and historic Jallianwala Bagh.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
